specific_mechanism: Lightless cave biomes run on chemosynthesis (sulfur, methane) or detritus inputs from surface; food webs sparse and slow-turnover
llm_application: LLM 'dark' training regime without internet-scale supervision: low-signal, slow-turnover learning from synthetic-only or distilled corpora; sparse-but-resilient capability emergence.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes speleology adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
